system:
You answer questions about a synthetic world using ONLY the provided episode excerpts.

Episode statements and their exact semantics:
- Observation "valid from day X": the fact holds at EVERY day >= X, forever. Facts never expire on their own.
- Observation "valid from day X until day Y": the fact holds for X <= day < Y.
- Policy (IF conditions THEN conclusion): at the evaluation day, if all conditions hold (matching shared variables like ?A consistently), the conclusion holds. Policies chain: a conclusion may satisfy another policy's condition.
- A policy applies only from its effective day onward, and only if not superseded.
- UNLESS exception: if the exception pattern is satisfiable for that binding, the policy does not fire for it.
- Supersession notice: from the stated day, the old policy stops applying (entirely, or only for bindings matching the stated condition). A superseded policy's conclusions are gone from that day unless re-derivable another way.
- Higher authority policies beat lower authority ones when they conflict; later-issued beats earlier at equal authority.

Answering:
- The question names the evaluation day. Evaluate at exactly that day.
- Answer true only if the fact is stated valid at that day or derivable via policies from facts valid at that day. Otherwise answer false.
- For true/false questions reply with exactly one word: true or false.
- For list questions reply with ONLY a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

=== Episode ep_248 (day 266) ===
From day 262, registry_B reports fct_0585, valid as of day 262: member_of(asset=asset_15, product=product_16).
The audit_note log on day 262 records fct_0748, effective day 262, showing registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_23, asset=asset_18).
As of day 263, partner_feed registers fct_0571, in force from day 263, that member_of(asset=asset_18, product=product_13).
On day 263, another partner_feed entry (fct_0742) becomes operative from day 263: offered_in(partner=partner_13, asset=asset_02).
Day 266 sees the introduction of policy rul_035 ("restricted_in policy 2 (revised)") at authority level 1, effective from day 266: when supplies(partner=partner_06, customer=?A, sector=sector_07) and member_of(asset=?B, product=product_00) both hold, then restricted_in(customer=?A, asset=?B) applies, unless registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_23, asset=?B) is the case.

=== Episode ep_222 (day 203) ===
Under the Longview exercise, logged on day 203 and effective from day 203, policy rul_038 (“approved_for policy 2 (scenario-narrowed)”, authority level 3) provides: IF member_of(asset=asset_19, product=?A) AND registered_in(jurisdiction=?B, asset=asset_19) AND rated_as(partner=?C, customer=?E) THEN approved_for(product=?A, jurisdiction=?B, partner=?C), UNLESS supplies(partner=?C, customer=customer_19, sector=sector_24) OR rated_as(partner=?C, customer=customer_05).
partner_02’s day-203 note could not have been more over-the-top if it tried: “Oh sure, member_of(asset=asset_07, product=product_03) — obviously.”
Notice sup_017, filed for the Longview exercise on day 203, has rul_038 taking over from rul_009 as of day 203; outside Longview, the desk maintains rul_009.

=== Episode ep_256 (day 287) ===
A registry_B entry from day 286, reference fct_0570 and in force from day 286, records that rated_as(partner=partner_03, customer=customer_02).
On day 286, audit_note logged fct_0581, valid from day 286, showing member_of(asset=asset_17, product=product_11).
The customer_disclosure filed on day 286, carried as fct_0590 from day 286, contains member_of(asset=asset_18, product=product_11).
Policy rul_027 ("exempt_from policy 1 (revised)"), introduced day 287 at authority level 5 and effective from day 287, provides that IF restricted_in(customer=customer_00, asset=?A) AND partnered_with(jurisdiction=?B, partner=?D, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_27) AND registered_in(jurisdiction=?E, asset=?A) THEN exempt_from(asset=?A, jurisdiction=?B), UNLESS rated_as(partner=?D, customer=customer_11) OR operates_in(partner=partner_11, asset=?A).

=== Episode ep_235 (day 234) ===
jurisdiction_19 projects, as of day 232, that supplies(partner=partner_14, customer=customer_11, sector=sector_06) will hold — forecast fct_0849.
audit_note on day 234, reference fct_0452, effective from day 234, notes that offered_in(partner=partner_03, asset=asset_07).
Per audit_note on day 234, member_of(asset=asset_06, product=product_08) is confirmed, valid from day 234 — fct_0583.
Policy rul_024 ("exempt_from policy 3 (revised)", authority level 1) logged on day 234 and effective from day 234: if eligible_for(partner=partner_03, asset=?A) and registered_in(jurisdiction=?B, asset=?A) and registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_21, asset=?A), then exempt_from(asset=?A, jurisdiction=?B), unless partnered_with(jurisdiction=?B, partner=partner_03, jurisdiction2=jurisdiction_13) or holds(asset=?A, product=product_14).

As of day 16, partner_feed notes registered_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_23, asset=asset_07), logged as fct_0118 and valid from day 16.
On day 16, customer_disclosure records fct_0123 — member_of(asset=asset_04, product=product_03) — in effect from day 16.

=== Episode ep_198 (day 152) ===
Logged on day 151, audit_note observation fct_0498 — effective from day 151 — confirms that holds(asset=asset_01, product=product_09).
Logged on day 152 within the Foxglove drill, policy rul_037 ("approved_for policy 2 (scenario-narrowed)", authority level 3) applies from day 152: IF member_of(asset=asset_19, product=?A) AND registered_in(jurisdiction=?B, asset=asset_19) AND rated_as(partner=?C, customer=?E) THEN approved_for(product=?A, jurisdiction=?B, partner=?C), UNLESS supplies(partner=?C, customer=customer_19, sector=sector_24) OR member_of(asset=asset_19, product=?A).

=== Episode ep_211 (day 184) ===
On day 180, an audit_note observation — fct_0582, valid from day 180 — records that member_of(asset=asset_07, product=product_02).
A customer_disclosure entry on day 182, fct_0496, effective from day 182, notes that holds(asset=asset_02, product=product_09).
registry_B reports on day 184, under fct_0435 and in force from day 184, that operates_in(partner=partner_00, asset=asset_18).

=== Episode ep_037 (day 14) ===
On day 14, partner_feed records fct_0054 — valid from day 14 — showing member_of(asset=asset_08, product=product_03).
registry_A’s entry fct_0135, logged on day 14 and effective from day 14, notes classified_as(sector=sector_20, product=product_18).
